title: anthyllis vulneraria proles webbiana
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria proles webbiana, also known as Webb's kidney vetch or Webb's anthyllis, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditionally, Webb's kidney vetch has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and creams, to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and wounds.
